form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.0 len at Gosford Cl1 March 14 over 1200m in soft going defeating Missile Magnate carrying 55kg at $16. Before that won by 1.1 len at Wyong 3yo Mdn February 21 over 1000m defeating Stubborn Emmelie carrying 55.5kg at $4.20. Respect in this rich vein of form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Chasing a hat-trick. Last start raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.0 len at Gosford Cl1 March 14 over 1200m in soft going defeating Missile Magnate carrying 55kg at $16. Before that won by 1.1 len at Wyong 3yo Mdn February 21 over 1000m defeating Stubborn Emmelie carrying 55.5kg at $4.20. Respect in this rich vein of form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted out and bumped Caledonian Blue.
Passing the 100m, shifted out when weakening.
Near the 150m shifted out under pressure and made contact with Rajwa.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 4th of 10 at Scone Cl2 on March 20 over 1100m, slow going 1.1 len behind Shotgun Bella carrying 58kg at $2.05. Previously second-up favourite; won by 1.75 len at Quirindi Cl1 November 13 over 1200m defeating Jamacri carrying 58kg at $1.60. Not beaten far last start and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Second run back. First-up after four months 4th of 10 at Scone Cl2 on March 20 over 1100m, slow going 1.1 len behind Shotgun Bella carrying 58kg at $2.05. Previously second-up favourite; won by 1.75 len at Quirindi Cl1 November 13 over 1200m defeating Jamacri carrying 58kg at $1.60. Not beaten far last start and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three-wide and without cover throughout the event.
Slow to begin and then hampered by Ring My Bell.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last campaign winning by neck Randwick Kensington 3yo F Mdn December 5 over 1300m defeating Champere carrying 57.5kg at $21. On debut second of 7 at Kembla Grange F&M Mdn-Sw October 25 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Virgil's Gift with 55.5kg at $8. Looks up against it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last campaign winning by neck Randwick Kensington 3yo F Mdn December 5 over 1300m defeating Champere carrying 57.5kg at $21. On debut second of 7 at Kembla Grange F&M Mdn-Sw October 25 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Virgil's Gift with 55.5kg at $8. Looks up against it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover throughout.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign 2nd of 7 at Wyong Cl1 on November 26 over 1100m, 0.5 len behind Columbia Blue carrying 56.5kg at $5. When resuming last campaign 4th of 7 at Canterbury 2yo F Mdn on May 28 over 1100m, on heavy track; 2.5 len behind Gilette carrying 57kg at $13. Runner-up in a Beaumont (Newcastle) trial over 1000m on March 24. Might be better off following this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign 2nd of 7 at Wyong Cl1 on November 26 over 1100m, 0.5 len behind Columbia Blue carrying 56.5kg at $5. When resuming last campaign 4th of 7 at Canterbury 2yo F Mdn on May 28 over 1100m, on heavy track; 2.5 len behind Gilette carrying 57kg at $13. Runner-up in a Beaumont (Newcastle) trial over 1000m on March 24. Might be better off following this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1100m, after shifting in, restrained by its rider R Downey.
Near the 50m shifted out and bumped Champagne Hero.
On jumping, shifted in, hampering Memo.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Returns from a 43 day let-up. First-up faded in the straight 5th of 8 at Warwick Farm 3yo F Mdn-Sw on January 26 over 1100m, 2 len behind Oz Princess carrying 56kg at $2.45. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 2.25 len at Kembla Grange Mdn-Sw February 24 over 1000m defeating Bedda Mia with 56.5kg at $1.45. Sharp Maiden winner who can go on with it here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Third-up today. Returns from a 43 day let-up. First-up faded in the straight 5th of 8 at Warwick Farm 3yo F Mdn-Sw on January 26 over 1100m, 2 len behind Oz Princess carrying 56kg at $2.45. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 2.25 len at Kembla Grange Mdn-Sw February 24 over 1000m defeating Bedda Mia with 56.5kg at $1.45. Sharp Maiden winner who can go on with it here.

form.formComment: Returns from a 57-day let-up. Last start won by 2 len at Wyong F&M Mdn February 10 over 1100m on a rain affected track defeating Helluva Kiss with 59.5kg at $4.40. The race before that from last on the turn second last of 7 at Randwick Kensington Super 2&3yo Mdn on January 21 over 1250m, slow going 3 len behind Prince Charge with 55.5kg at $3.60. Has not raced for eight weeks and will find this tougher.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Returns from a 57-day let-up. Last start won by 2 len at Wyong F&M Mdn February 10 over 1100m on a rain affected track defeating Helluva Kiss with 59.5kg at $4.40. The race before that from last on the turn second last of 7 at Randwick Kensington Super 2&3yo Mdn on January 21 over 1250m, slow going 3 len behind Prince Charge with 55.5kg at $3.60. Has not raced for eight weeks and will find this tougher.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 2nd in a small field at Randwick Kensington F&M Bm72 on March 25 over 1150m, on a slow track; 1.2 len behind Horseshoe Hill carrying 54.5kg at $6.50. The start before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at this track Cl1 on March 7 over 1300m, on a slow track; 0.9 len behind Seastraand with 56.5kg at $4. Not far away of late. Ready to get off the mark from the low draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Recent form sound. Most recently 2nd in a small field at Randwick Kensington F&M Bm72 on March 25 over 1150m, on a slow track; 1.2 len behind Horseshoe Hill carrying 54.5kg at $6.50. The start before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at this track Cl1 on March 7 over 1300m, on a slow track; 0.9 len behind Seastraand with 56.5kg at $4. Not far away of late. Ready to get off the mark from the low draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 800m, shifted in when not quite clear.
Slow to begin. Raced keenly during the middle stages.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Not seen since winning won by nose this track Prov Mdn-Sw November 27 over 1100m slow track defeating Rose Of Fenway with 55.5kg at $2.60. On debut ran last in a small field at Gosford Super Mdn November 11 over 1100m, 3 len behind Jarrito carrying 56kg at $8.50. Will take great benefit from this outing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). She is resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Not seen since winning won by nose this track Prov Mdn-Sw November 27 over 1100m slow track defeating Rose Of Fenway with 55.5kg at $2.60. On debut ran last in a small field at Gosford Super Mdn November 11 over 1100m, 3 len behind Jarrito carrying 56kg at $8.50. Will take great benefit from this outing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began only fairly. Laid out rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, 2nd in a small field at Wyong 3yo Mdn on February 21 over 1000m, 1.1 len behind Premium with 57kg at $2.10. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a head at Gosford Super Mdn-Sw March 14 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Gamp carrying 56.5kg at $4. Brings the right form to the table. Sure to measure up at the good odds.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Lining up for just third start. Sure to measure up at the good odds.
